text.title: AI Transcript to Traceable Requirement Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every AI Transcript to Traceable Requirement application MUST enforce. HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Every requirement record cites a verbatim quote with timestamp / transcript line range.

rationale.source: AI Transcript to Traceable Requirement authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Paraphrased requirements lose semantic precision; verbatim quote is the falsifiability anchor.

rule.statement: Source stakeholder named (handle / role / email); never 'someone said'.

rationale.source: AI Transcript to Traceable Requirement authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Anonymous source = no audit trail; named stakeholder enables follow-up clarification.

rule.statement: Record carries ambiguity flag (low / medium / high) with classification reason.

rationale.source: AI Transcript to Traceable Requirement authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Hidden ambiguity propagates downstream; explicit flag forces resolution before estimation.

rule.statement: Each record typed (functional / non-functional / constraint / assumption).

rationale.source: AI Transcript to Traceable Requirement authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Untyped requirements get mis-routed in backlog grooming.

rule.statement: Record carries a back-link from the transcript line to the requirement id and vice versa.

rationale.source: AI Transcript to Traceable Requirement authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Unidirectional links break on rename; bidirectional links enable forensic recovery.

section.title: Conclusion targets used by the decision tree

rule.statement: Run the full procedure; emit an artefact passing the output contract.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions hold.

rule.statement: Skip; surface the missing precondition; do not synthesize.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions fail.
